acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was used in a data-dependent mode, which automatically switched between MS and MS/MS.
cleavage agent: Trypsin was specified as enzyme and up to two miss cleavages were allowed.
fragmentation method: the 10 most abundant peptides were subjected to HCD fragmentation.
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap Q-Exactive mass spectrometer.
labeling: peptides were analyzed using a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer with HCD fragmentation at NCE 28.
reduction reagent: 1 mM dithiothreitol (DTT), 2.5 mM d-Desthiobiotin and 0.05% Triton X-100, pH 7.4).
reduction concentration: 1 mM dithiothreitol (DTT), 2.5 mM d-Desthiobiotin and 0.05% Triton X-100, pH 7.4).
